lessons.title: The Mice Who Lived in a Shoe
lessons.objective: Students will read and discuss the story, use vocabulary in context, practice target phonics patterns, identify common and proper nouns, and answer cause-and-effect questions.
lessons.iDo: Model vocabulary thinking, phonics decoding, and a cause-and-effect example from the story.
lessons.weDo: Read a section together, identify one cause and effect, and practice using vocabulary orally.
lessons.youDo: Students complete the connected skills practice and respond to a cause-and-effect prompt.
lessons.exitTicket: Write one cause and one effect from today's reading.

lessons.title: Ellie's Long Walk
lessons.objective: Students will identify main idea and details, practice fluency, use vocabulary in context, and connect text evidence to comprehension.
lessons.iDo: Model how to find the main idea by asking what the section is mostly about.
lessons.weDo: Read a short passage together and choose details that support the main idea.
lessons.youDo: Students complete the main idea and details practice pages and fluency reflection.
lessons.exitTicket: Write the main idea of the passage and two supporting details.
smallGroups: Red: vocabulary visuals and decoding support

teacherMoves: Use partner talk before written responses.
Pause for vocabulary visuals before reading.
Ask students to cite details from the text.
Keep I Do / We Do / You Do visible.
End with a quick reflection note for Future Jennifer.
